Trojan war inspired concept video I’ve been working on. Made entirely with Nano Banana Pro and Kling 3.0.

If you are a brand looking for cinematic visuals like this, my DMs are open.

#nanobananapro #kling3 #higgsfield #higgsfieldai #trojanhorse

1. Add your clip to the timeline in CapCut.
Start a new project, import the video, and drag it onto the main timeline.

2. Create the opening “black bars reveal” effect.
Go to Overlay - Add overlay - Stock videos / Shapes and add a solid black rectangle. Stretch it so it covers the top half of the screen. Then duplicate it and place the second one on the bottom half.

3. Position the bars so the frame is almost fully covered at the start.
Move the playhead to the first frame. Select the top black bar and place if lower so it hides most of the top of the video. Select the bottom bar and place it higher so it hides most of the bottom. Leave only a thin strip of the video visible in the center.

4. Keyframe the bars to slide open.
With the playhead at the start, add 5 keyframes to both black bars, evenly spaced out in the timeline. For each keyframe, drag the top door so it is in the hand of the subject. The bottom door keyframes should be assembled to make the movement speed the same.

5. Add text to the video. 

6. Duplicate the man clip with you in it, auto cutout background of the duplicate. Cut and paste the duplicate on top of the moment your head comes back up from ducking down. Now you are in front of the text.

Follow @fasulostudio for more!

#capcut #editing #videoediting #videoeffects #keyframe

Here’s how:

1. Upload your first reel into the edits app (“Links” button -> Reel -> Select Reel from your page).
2. Repeat this step for as many Reels as you like. 
3. Size each reel so they all fit evenly. 
4. Edit as you like!

Follow @fasulostudio for more editing and AI tips!

You really never know what to expect the next time you hop on reels.

Thor’s hammer effect made in Nano Banana Pro and Kling 3.0. Surprisingly simple effect that you can add into your next creative. 

Share this with someone and follow for more episodes in this series where I show you how to make premium effects with AI. 

Kling 3.0 Prompt:

“The shot begins in a wide interior view of the apartment. The man stands centered in the room facing the camera, arm extended forward with his hand raised as if summoning something. The environment is still - kitchen lights glowing behind him, furniture and objects softly lit.
Immediately at the start of the shot, the camera violentlv accelerates forward toward the man’s hand. The man remains completely still during the motion, maintaining his stance and focused expression. His hand stays extended, fingers slightly open as if guiding the motion.
The camera continues accelerating until it reaches his hand, finishing in an extreme close-up as the motion abruptly stops the moment it arrives, as though the camera itself has been pulled directly into his grasp.”

#higgsfieldai #nanobananapro #kling3 #aidigitalmarketing #aieffects

Desert crimson sky creative concept for Oakley built entirely with Nano Banana Pro and Kling 2.5 Turbo. Decided to have some fun with it and throw myself in there.

It feels like this software is getting better and better by the week, the facial realism is insane.

If you are a brand looking for cinematic visuals to take your creatives to the next level, my DMs are open.
